rationale: Reconstructed det.rs with the full surrounding context (use vstd::prelude::*, Ordering/KeyTrait/KeyIterator/StrictlyOrderedVec/StrictlyOrderedMap definitions inside verus! block) since the workdir copy only contained the synthetic obligation. Used the previously-successful proof block: case-split on whether k1=keys@[r1]==k2=keys@[r2]. When iter is end, the glb-spec property 2 gives glb1.above(k2) and glb2.above(k1) forcing k1<k2 and k2<k1 (asymmetry contradiction); when iter is not end, pick gap-witness hi via choose and show the larger of the two keys lies in the open (smaller_glb, hi) interval, contradicting the gap. Then sortedness of self_.keys@ collapses index equality. Verus exited 0 (2 verified, 0 errors).
